name: nimble
claim: extensible columnar storage for datasets with thousands of columns
claim_summary: official CMake configure remains non-reproducible on this host; no wide-table projection was measured

attempts.entrypoint: official CMake build with Velox and OpenZL submodules
attempts.workload: configure a release build before the planned 1,024-column projection test
attempts.result: CMake generation could not resolve protobuf::libprotobuf and fmt::fmt in sibling Nimble directories

attempts.entrypoint: official CMake build with pinned submodules and system dependencies
attempts.workload: configure a release build with CMake 4.1.2, Clang 21.1.8, and VELOX_ENABLE_GEO=OFF

environment.dependency_acquisition: mixed Nix and Homebrew environments; no absolute paths retained
environment.dependency_warning: CMake reported that protoc 33.4 did not match the protobuf library 7.35.1

attempts.result: protobuf and fmt targets resolved, but the bundled xsimd dependency stopped configuration because its CMake minimum version is older than CMake 4.1.2; no build or projection test was attempted

retry_when: the pinned official tree configures and builds with its submodules, or a standalone reader/writer is published
